name: Biryani Rice Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Chicken, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Wash rice and put in a small saucepan with all the above ingredients. Bring to a boil on high heat, then cover and simmer gently until all the water is absorbed. The grains should be tender but firm. Set aside uncovered.
Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onions and fry until golden around the edges. Add garlic and ginger. All at once add all the spices and fry for one minute longer.
Add chicken, salt to taste, tomatoes, potatoes, yogurt, and saffron milk mixture. Cover and cook on low heat until chicken is tender, stirring occasionally (about 1/2 hour). There should be very little liquid remaining in the pan. If necessary, add a small amount of water during cooking to prevent sticking.
Add half the prepared rice, spreading it evenly over the mixture, drizzle with one tablespoon of oil, and sprinkle saffron into two teaspoons of milk. Cover with remaining rice and cook on very low heat for ten minutes. Serve accompanied by whipped, lightly sweetened yogurt. The chicken could be substituted with 1/2 pound of mixed vegetables.
